profile.summary: Registered Nurse with 8 years of acute-care experience and 3 years as a ward charge nurse. Led a nursing team of 14 across rotating shifts and reduced medication-administration errors by 32 percent over two years.

experiences.title: Ward Charge Nurse
experiences.description: Shift leadership and clinical oversight on a 28-bed acute medical ward.
achievements: Led a nursing team of 14 across rotating shifts and reduced medication-administration errors by 32 percent over two years.
Cut bed-turnaround time from 95 to 60 minutes by redesigning the discharge handover checklist.
Designed a structured preceptorship that shortened new-starter onboarding from 8 to 5 weeks and mentored 12 junior nurses.

experiences.title: Staff Nurse, Acute Medicine
experiences.description: Direct patient care on a busy acute medical unit.
achievements: Managed a caseload of up to 8 patients per shift while maintaining a 98 percent care-plan compliance rate.
Championed a hand-hygiene initiative that improved audit scores from 86 to 97 percent across the unit.

jobPosting.title: Senior Charge Nurse / Care Manager (Acute)
jobPosting.fullText: Pennine Care General Hospital is a 410-bed NHS trust serving the Leeds area and rated 'Good' by the Care Quality Commission. We are recruiting a Senior Charge Nurse / Care Manager (m/f/d) for our 32-bed acute medical unit. Responsibilities: clinical and managerial leadership of a team of around 25 nursing staff, staff rostering, ensuring nursing quality standards, and continuing development of our care-quality framework. Requirements: valid NMC registration, several years of acute-care experience, and demonstrable leadership or supervisory experience. We offer structured induction, NHS Agenda for Change banding, and a generous CPD budget. Your point of contact is Ms Rebecca Hartley, Director of Nursing. Please indicate your earliest possible start date in your application.
